expectations.text: Lists at least 2 distinct hypotheses for what could be causing the bug
expectations.evidence: Goes directly to 'Root Cause: overflow: hidden on the Parent Container' without listing alternative hypotheses. Does later reconsider and revise its analysis, but this is self-correction, not hypothesis enumeration.

expectations.text: Proposes a diagnostic step or experiment before jumping to the final fix
expectations.evidence: Jumps from root cause analysis directly to 'The Fix' section. No experimental steps proposed.

expectations.text: Explains what evidence confirms the root cause before applying the fix
expectations.evidence: Provides a detailed explanation of how overflow:hidden creates a clipping boundary and how box-shadow clipping affects the visual perception of corners.

expectations.text: Correctly identifies overflow: hidden on the parent .content-area as the cause of clipped corners
expectations.evidence: Correctly identifies 'overflow: hidden on .content-area clips card box-shadows and rounded corner rendering'

expectations.text: Fix modifies Layout.css rather than Card.css
expectations.evidence: Fix changes overflow:hidden to overflow-x:hidden in Layout.css
